title: 4 Reasons Why Housing Looks Poised for a Big Rebound
text: It's probably hard for those who are bearish to believe, but the alignment of the macroeconomic stars is poised to support a housing rebound. Specifically, the overall labor market remains strong, while interest rates are dropping and are likely to fall further as inflation's deceleration gathers steam later this year.

title: Home Sales Making Steady Rebound: 4 Stocks to Watch
